# Support

- Security issues: see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md). Report privately.
- Bugs and feature requests: open an issue with the matching template.
- On-chain programs and the verifier: https://github.com/Jatcotcash/jat-program
- Circuits and trusted setup: https://github.com/Jatcotcash/jat-circuits

The SDK runs against Solana devnet. Do not use it with real funds.
